scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.zip: powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path client, server, scripts, transcripts, package.json, package-lock.json, README.md, .gitignore -DestinationPath InsideIIM_TakeHomeAssignment.zip -Force"
